name: cpg-fmcg
description: Consumer Packaged Goods / Fast-Moving Consumer Goods preset pack. Ten sub-verticals plus a sustainability cross-cutting overlay, anchored in industry-standard taxonomies (GS1, ISA-95, ISO 22400, GHG Protocol). Includes a curated reference set from Gartner, Deloitte, KPMG, WEF, NielsenIQ, and Circana research published 2025-2026.

subVerticals.name: supply-chain
subVerticals.description: Demand sensing, inventory health, OTIF, S&OP, control tower, logistics.

subVerticals.name: procurement
subVerticals.description: Sourcing, supplier risk, contracts, commodity exposure, RFx orchestration.

subVerticals.name: manufacturing
subVerticals.description: OEE, yield, downtime, predictive maintenance, quality, batch genealogy.

subVerticals.name: commercial-retail
subVerticals.description: Revenue growth management, trade promotion, retail execution, digital shelf, JBP.

subVerticals.name: finance-fpa
subVerticals.description: Margin bridge, working capital, FP&A, scenario modelling, close anomaly detection.

subVerticals.name: hr
subVerticals.description: Workforce planning, skills, frontline staffing, safety, learning, attrition.

subVerticals.name: it-admin
subVerticals.description: Service desk, infrastructure, application portfolio, AI governance ops, license utilisation.

subVerticals.name: vendor-management
subVerticals.description: Supplier 360, contract intelligence, tier 2/3/4 dependency, ESG scorecards.

subVerticals.name: client-management
subVerticals.description: Retail customer JBP, scorecards, deductions; warehousing-client SLAs and throughput.

subVerticals.name: sustainability
subVerticals.description: Cross-cutting overlay: Scope 1/2/3 emissions, water, waste, packaging, ESG reporting.

references.label: Gartner: top supply chain technology trends 2025
